benchmark_honesty_caveat: Autonomous second-round repair-context selector output. Hidden aligned target Lean declarations, statements, names, and proofs are not included. Mathlib signatures here are included only after Lean #check hydration.

checked_signatures.name: PowerSeries.coeff_mul
checked_signatures.signature:
PowerSeries.coeff_mul.{u_1} {R : Type u_1} [Semiring R] (n : ℕ) (φ ψ : R⟦X⟧) :
  (coeff n) (φ * ψ) = ∑ p ∈ antidiagonal n, (coeff p.1) φ * (coeff p.2) ψ

checked_signatures.name: Ring.add_choose_eq
checked_signatures.signature:
Ring.add_choose_eq.{u_1} {R : Type u_1} [Ring R] [BinomialRing R] {r s : R} (k : ℕ) (h : Commute r s) :
  Ring.choose (r + s) k = ∑ ij ∈ antidiagonal k, Ring.choose r ij.1 * Ring.choose s ij.2

checked_signatures.name: Finset.sum_pow'
checked_signatures.signature:
Finset.sum_pow'.{u_2, u_4} {κ : Type u_2} {R : Type u_4} [CommSemiring R] (s : Finset κ) (f : κ → R) (n : ℕ) :
  (∑ a ∈ s, f a) ^ n = ∑ p ∈ Fintype.piFinset fun _i => s, ∏ i, f (p i)
